creator: joki@kuebart.stuttgart.netsurf.de
text:
The man page of login_getclass(3) documents this function to be
	login_cap_t *
	login_getclass(const struct passwd *pwd)

which is incorrect.
The login_cap.h file shows that
	login_cap_t *
	login_getclass(const char *)

and

	login_cap_t *
	login_getpwdclass(const struct passwd *)

Fix: 

update man page of login_getclass(3)
How-To-Repeat: 
man 3 login_getclass
